scope.summary: Embedded ModelRuntime real-load conformance hardening: box the default embedded-model load path under a SandboxAdapter and emit ProcessOwnershipLedger START/STOP rows, and emit a Flight Recorder event on the DisabledLlmClient / fail-closed error paths, all validated with a REAL Candle model load.
scope.origin: Deferred from MT-003 (2026-07-01) pre/post-implementation review. MT-003 made the embedded ModelRuntime the default local LlmClient path, but the embedded model-load path (llm/boot.rs build_default_local_client -> CandleRuntime/LlamaCppRuntime::load) has ZERO SandboxAdapter / ProcessOwnershipLedger wiring (the boxed path is the separate SandboxModelRuntime used only by the swarm factory), which violates master-spec-v02.197 3.6.2/4.6.1 (HARD; MUST fail the 5.6 HBR gate). Additionally DisabledLlmClient returns an error without emitting a Flight Recorder event (pre-existing, mod.rs), against 4.2.3.2(3). These are coupled to a real model load, so they are deferred here rather than faked in MT-003. This is a real conformance gap, NOT a re-implementation of engines (WP-KERNEL-004 owns the adapters).
forbidden_paths: re-implementing llama.cpp/Candle engine internals (WP-KERNEL-004 owns them)
acceptance_criteria: The default embedded-model load path (llm/boot.rs build_default_local_client) loads the model under the configured SandboxAdapter (default HandshakeNativeSandboxAdapter, master-spec 3.5.2) and registers ProcessOwnershipLedger START on load + STOP on unload (master-spec 3.6.2/4.6.1), so the boxed+ledgered obligation the swarm factory already satisfies also holds for the LlmClient default path; verified with a REAL Candle CPU model load (feature candle-runtime-engine).

DisabledLlmClient (and any fail-closed error return on the default LLM path) emits a Flight Recorder event carrying the disabled/error reason so 'every call emits a Flight Recorder event' (master-spec 4.2.3.2(3)) holds on the error path too; a test proves the FR event is emitted.

The LocalModelRuntimeLlmClient::embedding() path (added by MT-003) emits a Flight Recorder event with trace_id/model_id (embeddings carry no TokenUsage, so record the embedding-appropriate FR shape) so the embedding lane is Flight-Recorder-correlatable per 4.2.3.2(3)/11.5; a test proves emission. (Deferred from MT-003 post-review: embedding() currently carries EmbeddingRequest.trace_id but does not emit, matching the removed OllamaAdapter parity.)

A real-load runtime proof (cargo test --features "test-utils,candle-runtime-engine" against tests/candle_e2e_smoke.rs or a new embedded-default e2e test) shows a ProcessOwnershipLedger START row on load and STOP row on unload for the default embedded model, and no bare std::process::Command model spawn.

Same-change UserManual coverage for the embedded-load boxing/ledger + FR-on-error behavior; HBR-INT-009 three-tier posture recorded (Flight Recorder WIRED; internal_diagnostics + Palmistry DEFERRED-with-reason until WP-KERNEL-012/016).
Pre- and post-implementation adversarial review before READY_FOR_VALIDATION; implementer does not self-certify COMPLETED.
proof_targets: TO_BE_FINALIZED_AT_ACTIVATION: exact Rust tests proving (a) embedded default load boxes under SandboxAdapter + emits ProcessOwnershipLedger START/STOP (real Candle load, --features "test-utils,candle-runtime-engine"); (b) DisabledLlmClient/fail-closed path emits a Flight Recorder event (engine-free, --features test-utils). Proof commands MUST name exact tests and fail on zero matching tests.
scope.risk_if_missed: The default local model path runs an unboxed, unledgered model load - a master-spec 3.6.2/4.6.1 HARD violation and a swarm-safety/attribution gap (no ownership/reclaim record for the default model process), and error/disabled LLM calls are invisible to Flight Recorder replay.
reference_only_paths: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/sandbox_runtime.rs (SandboxModelRuntime = the existing boxed path, reference pattern)

implementation_notes: MT-003 already routes the default LlmClient through the embedded ModelRuntime and fails closed to DisabledLlmClient; this MT hardens the LOAD path's boxing/ledger + the error-path FR emission. It does NOT change the Ollama-kill wiring or re-implement engines.

Reference the existing boxed path model_runtime/sandbox_runtime.rs (SandboxModelRuntime) and process_ledger/ for the START/STOP row pattern; the default LlmClient load path must obtain the same boxing/ledger guarantee (either by routing the load through a SandboxAdapter/ledger-emitting seam, or by the CandleRuntime/LlamaCppRuntime load itself emitting the ledger rows).

For the in-process Candle library load, the '(1) child of a SandboxAdapter / no bare std::process::Command' clause of 3.6.2 is ambiguous (no process is spawned); the UNCONDITIONAL obligation is the ProcessOwnershipLedger START/STOP (4.6.1 unload -> STOP row). Prove the ledger obligation first; box under SandboxAdapter where a process/guest is actually spawned.
Requires a real Candle CPU model load (moderate, pure-Rust) — coordinate with heavy-load constraints; do NOT compile llama.cpp for this MT.
Rust-only; Rust backend + native egui/Argus where UI is touched.

risks: The load path could be 'boxed' only in tests (fake sandbox) and remain unboxed in the real default path.
ProcessOwnershipLedger rows could be emitted without a real reclaim/STOP on unload.
FR-on-error could be added only to DisabledLlmClient construction, missing other fail-closed return points.
minimum_controls: Real Candle load proof shows START+STOP rows and no bare Command spawn.
Unload/reclaim path proven, not just START.
Every fail-closed return on the default LLM path emits an FR event.

product_code_evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/llm/boot.rs build_default_local_client (unboxed default load path introduced by MT-003)
src/backend/handshake_core/src/llm/mod.rs DisabledLlmClient (no FR emit on error)

handshake_compatibility.rust_only_implementation: Rust backend plus native egui/Argus only.
handshake_compatibility.spec_realism_gate: Implementer may move only to READY_FOR_VALIDATION after a REAL Candle model load proves boxing+ledger; COMPLETED is validator-only.
